sentences.arabic: ذَهَبَ كَامِلٌ إِلَى مَحَلِّ الحَلَوِيَّاتِ مَعَ أَخِيهِ.
sentences.translation: Kamil je otišao u slastičarnicu s bratom.
sentences.translationEn: Kamil went to the confectionery shop with his brother.

sentences.arabic: اخْتَارَ كُلُّ وَاحِدٍ مَا يُحِبُّهُ مِنَ الحَلْوَى.
sentences.translation: Svaki od njih je odabrao slatkiše koje voli.
sentences.translationEn: Each one chose the sweets they liked.

sentences.arabic: سَأَلَ كَامِلٌ البَائِعَ عَنْ مَجْمُوعِ الثَّمَنِ.
sentences.translation: Kamil je pitao prodavača za ukupnu cijenu.
sentences.translationEn: Kamil asked the seller about the total price.

sentences.translation: Platio je za obojicu i izašli su jedući.
sentences.translationEn: He paid for both and they left eating.
